## Pull Requests

Thank you for your interest in contributing to TiaCommander.

This repository currently serves as the **public release channel** for
TiaCommander. Source code is maintained in a private repository.

**We are not accepting pull requests at this time.**

If you have found a bug or want to suggest a feature, please
[open an issue](https://github.com/a4webdev/tiacommander-mcp/issues/new/choose)
instead.

If you are interested in contributing to TiaCommander's development,
please see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for details on how
to get in touch.
